"RP NOW WB JWO RAMSEY ON RS"

details.IncidentDetail: "[3] NOW WB JWO RAMSEY ON RS"
"[13] 76-N7 WILL HAVE TRAFFIC CONTROL AT NB SR 86 JSO 72ND #2 LANE WILL BE CLOSED FOR THE BRUSH FIRE. UNK DURATION "
"[10] B76-86 CALTRANS BOTH LNS CLOSED 86 N SO 81ST HARD CLOSURE AND TRFC IS BEING DIVERTED TO 81ST andSB 86"
"[9] S7 GOT THE OK TO OPEN SB LANES FRM THE 66TH WILL BE BRINGING TRFC SLOW "
"[8] ^ 20 NOW SET UP 67TH AVE JEO BUCHANAN "
"[3] ^ S7 AT 1604 DIVERTING NB TRFC TO WB HARRISON /// AND SB WILL BE ABLE TO GO EB OR WB ON 66TH AVE"
"[1] THERE WILL BE A ROAD CLOSURE DUE TO A BRUSH FIRE "
"[2] WHI FORD F15 RAPTOR VS BLU VEH"
"[2] ASSOC WITH OVER TURN SEMI TRK LOG 22"
"[4] CT WILL 1023 WITH PTY TILL UNIT IS 1097 "
"[1] SOLO VEH TC WHI HYUN ELANTRA PLT 9WOT396"
